spec.query:
from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "postgresql")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "numbackends")
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "uptime")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "disk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path == "/")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load1")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nginx")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "reading")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nginx")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "writing")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nginx")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "waiting")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "systemd_units")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active_code")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r.name == "nginx.service" or
      r.name == "postgresql-18.service" or
      r.name == "telegraf.service" or
      r.name == "sshd.service"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["name"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      Service: r.name,
      Status: r.active,
      SubStatus: r.sub,
      Loaded: r.load
  }))

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bytes_recv" )

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bytes_sent")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "disk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.path == "/")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.cpu == "cpu-total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_system")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "used_percent")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nginx")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nginx")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "requests")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "postgresql")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "numbackends")
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")

from(bucket: "server_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "postgresql")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "xact_commit")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "server_metrics",
  tag: "host"
)

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "server_metrics",
  tag: "db"
)

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "server_metrics",
  tag: "name"
)
